summary: Analytics Dashboard feature fully tested - all 9 backend endpoints working, all 3 tabs functional with charts, gauges, and tables
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard at /analytics route is fully functional. 9 backend endpoints under /api/analytics/* all return valid data. Frontend has 3 tabs (Engine Performance, AI Quality & Drift, System Health) with Recharts visualizations. Polling updates every 5 seconds. System health metrics are MOCKED with random data.

backend_endpoints.returns: timestamp, total_executions, success_rate, avg_duration_ms, error_count, recent_5min, active_engines, system
array of engine usage with count and display_name
array with avg/min/max/p95 latency per engine
array with error rates and severity per engine
array with drift alerts (status, trend, message)
cpu_usage, memory_usage, disk_usage, active_connections, uptime_hours, status (MOCKED)
time series data with 12 data points per engine
3 LLM models with latency, tokens/sec, cost

Engine Performance tab - error rates table
